'''dabama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chafery|chafery]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-b-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chafery|chafery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dabama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæbæmæth|dæbæmæth]] || [[word:dæbæmæj|dæbæmæj]] || [[word:dæbæmæsh|dæbæmæsh]] || [[word:dæbæmæ|dæbæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dababamath|dababamath]] || [[word:dababamaj|dababamaj]] || [[word:dababamash|dababamash]] || [[word:dababama|dababama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dabamath|dabamath]] || [[word:dabamaj|dabamaj]] || [[word:dabamash|dabamash]] || [[word:dabama|dabama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dabafmath|dabafmath]] || [[word:dabafmaj|dabafmaj]] || [[word:dabafmash|dabafmash]] || [[word:dabafmaf|dabafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dabamatha|dabamatha]] || [[word:dabamaja|dabamaja]] || [[word:dabamasha|dabamasha]] || [[word:dabamaka|dabamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dabamath|dabamath]] || [[word:dabamaj|dabamaj]] || [[word:dabamash|dabamash]] || [[word:dabama|dabama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dabamathal|dabamathal]] || [[word:dabamajal|dabamajal]] || [[word:dabamashal|dabamashal]] || [[word:dabamakal|dabamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dabamathatha|dabamathatha]] || [[word:dabamajaja|dabamajaja]] || [[word:dabamashasha|dabamashasha]] || [[word:dabamaka|dabamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dabamathan|dabamathan]] || [[word:dabamajan|dabamajan]] || [[word:dabamashan|dabamashan]] || [[word:dabamakan|dabamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dabamathaoro|dabamathaoro]] || [[word:dabamajaoro|dabamajaoro]] || [[word:dabamashaoro|dabamashaoro]] || [[word:dabamakaoro|dabamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
